query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT id, 'Early American History', 'Explore Native American civilizations, European exploration, colonial America, and the founding of the United States.', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'American Revolution and Constitution', 'Understand the causes and events of the American Revolution, the Declaration of Independence, and the Constitution.', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Westward Expansion and Civil War', 'Learn about manifest destiny, slavery, the Civil War, and Reconstruction. Understand the causes and consequences of these periods.', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Industrial Revolution and Progressive Era', 'Explore industrialization, immigration, labor movements, and reform movements in America.', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'American Imperialism and World Wars', 'Understand American expansion, World War I, the Great Depression, and World War II.', 5, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Cold War and Modern America', 'Learn about the Cold War, space race, civil rights movement, and contemporary American history.', 6, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'World History and Civilizations', 'Explore major world civilizations, empires, and global historical events that shaped our world.', 7, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Civics and Government', 'Understand the structure of government, the three branches, voting, rights and responsibilities, and the political process.', 8, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SS';
